steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The student claims mixed feelings about cultured meat are a barrier to adoption. The key signal is a contradiction between belief and behavior—something people view positively but won't actually do.

steps.title: Match the contradiction to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A shows consumers believing cultured meat is environmentally good while refusing to eat it—this contradiction directly demonstrates the mixed feelings that would block adoption.

The others lack this contradiction:
  • B addresses packaging preferences unrelated to cultured meat
  • C presents only proponents' positive claims (not consumer ambivalence)
  • D describes livestock flavor variation (irrelevant to cultured meat)
.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
